<response>
{"probabilities":{"team_a_win":0.70,"draw":0.20,"team_b_win":0.10},"predicted_score":"2-0","predicted_winner":"Austria","knockout_resolution":{"ended_in_extra_time":false,"ended_in_penalties":false,"penalty_shootout_score":null},"confidence":0.85}
</response>
<reasoning>
We need to produce probabilities for group match between Austria and Jordan. Use FIFA rankings: Austria 24, Jordan 63. Austria strong, high goals scored avg 2.2, conceded 0.6. Jordan avg 1.73 both. Austria has 10 wins, 3 draws, 2 losses in 15 matches. Jordan 6 wins, 2 draws, 7 losses. Recent logs: Austria has many wins, high scoring. Jordan has mixed, some wins but also losses. So probability of Austria win high, maybe 0.75, draw 0.15, Jordan win 0.10. But we need to consider host: United States, neutral. Austria not home advantage. But still strong. So maybe 0.70, draw 0.20, Jordan 0.10. Let's set probabilities: team_a_win 0.70, draw 0.20, team_b_win 0.10. Sum 1.0.

Predicted score: Austria likely 2-0 or 2-1. Jordan maybe 0-1? But predicted score should reflect full regular + extra time. In group stage no extra time. So predicted score maybe "2-0". Predicted winner: "Austria". Knockout resolution: ended_in_extra_time false, ended_in_penalties false, penalty_shootout_score null. Confidence: maybe 0.85.

Return JSON.
</reasoning>
